name: Star Trading
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Royal Exchanges made this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.9 * x)%, where x is highest Royal Exchanges this Reincarnation

name: Energy Recharge
effect: Maximum Mana counts more based on Order time this Reincarnation. Also improves Precognition and sets duration to 5 min.
formula: (0.25 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is Order time this Reincarnation

name: Cosmic Resonance
effect: Increase Royal Exchange bonus based on clicks this Reincarnation.
formula: +(0.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is clicks this Reincarnation

name: Constellation
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on Unique Buildings owned.
formula: (0.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is Unique Buildings owned

name: Archon Pride
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on current Lineage level.
formula: (x)%, where x is current Lineage level

name: Absent-mindedness
effect: Increase Offline bonus based on Excavation Resets this Reincarnation.
formula: (30 + 3 * (x + y) ^ 3)%, where x is free resets, y is ruby resets this Reincarnation

name: Superior Consciousness
effect: Increase production of Unique buildings based on their quantity.
formula: (x)%, where x is Unique Buildings owned

name: Strange Attraction
effect: Multiplicatively increase FC find chance based on activity time of your least-used spell.
formula: (100 + 0.8 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is least-used spell activity time this Reincarnation

name: Arcane Core
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on mana produced this Reincarnation.
formula: (2.5 * log10(1 + x) ^ 2.5)%, where x is mana produced this Reincarnation

name: Purity of Form
effect: Lineage levels count 200% more for all purposes.

name: Absolute Hierarchy
effect: Remove 1 Ascension Penalty from Call to Arms.

name: Essence Extractor
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on duration of longest spell.
formula: (0.15 * x ^ 0.7)%, where x is longest spell duration
